task_completion.description: Verify that the required bookmark folders are created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Chrome Bookmark Manager or Bookmarks bar displaying the exact folders: 'Environment', 'Fish Health', 'Feed Logistics', and 'Local Sensors'.

task_completion.description: Verify that unauthorized entertainment sites have been removed from bookmarks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Chrome Bookmark Manager to ensure none of the unauthorized sites (youtube, reddit, netflix, hulu, twitch, steampowered, facebook) are present in the bookmarks.

task_completion.description: Verify that Chrome is set to open specific pages on startup.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at Chrome Settings > 'On startup'. The option 'Open a specific page or set of pages' should be selected with 'tidesandcurrents.noaa.gov' and '10.0.0.50' listed.

task_completion.description: Verify that Memory Saver exceptions are added for dashboard tabs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at Chrome Settings > 'Performance'. Under Memory Saver, the 'Always keep these sites active' list should include '10.0.0.50', '10.0.0.51', '10.0.0.52', and 'tidesandcurrents.noaa.gov'.

task_completion.description: Verify that insecure content is allowed for local IoT sensors.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at Chrome Settings > 'Privacy and security' > 'Site Settings' > 'Insecure content'. The 'Allowed to show insecure content' list should include '10.0.0.50', '10.0.0.51', and '10.0.0.52'.

task_completion.description: Verify that custom search engines are added.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at Chrome Settings > 'Search engine' > 'Manage search engines and site search'. The 'Site search' list should include entries with shortcuts 'fb' (for fishbase.se) and 'hach' (for hach.com).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Chrome GUI to configure settings and bookmarks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Chrome browser interface being navigated, rather than a terminal window editing the Chrome 'Preferences' JSON file directly.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Chrome application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The settings pages and bookmark manager should look like genuine Chrome interfaces, not a text editor or mock-up.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use scripts to bypass manual configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of bash or python scripts being executed in the terminal to modify the Chrome profile.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Bookmark folders to create: 'Environment', 'Fish Health', 'Feed Logistics', 'Local Sensors'. Unauthorized domains to remove: youtube.com, reddit.com, netflix.com, hulu.com, twitch.tv, steampowered.com, facebook.com. Startup URLs: tidesandcurrents.noaa.gov, 10.0.0.50. Memory Saver exceptions: 10.0.0.50, 10.0.0.51, 10.0.0.52, tidesandcurrents.noaa.gov. Insecure content allowed IPs: 10.0.0.50, 10.0.0.51, 10.0.0.52. Custom search engines: shortcut 'fb' for fishbase.se/Summary/SpeciesSummary.php?id= and 'hach' for hach.com/search?q=.
